seoTitle: Micalo Island vs Middle Arm — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Micalo Island and Middle Arm. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Micalo Island vs Middle Arm: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Micalo Island and Middle Arm.
heading: Micalo Island vs Middle Arm — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Micalo Island, New South Wales and Middle Arm, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Micalo Island has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Middle Arm (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Micalo Island or Middle Arm safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Micalo Island has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Middle Arm scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Micalo Island scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Middle Arm scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Micalo Island or Middle Arm?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Micalo Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
